name: Jiangshi Goumang | Nine Sols
description:
Technically is Dead Dove because you're forcing her to do whatever you want
She still has her legs but nothing stopping from cutting them off
Art by Azura Inalis
The concept was good, but I didn't really like how it turned out
It's funny how I always say "might remake this in the future" and never do anything about the bot again
Reviews are greatly appreciated
You should play Nine Sols.
creator: Nine Sols Enthusiast
